inputs.memories: We met on a friday night September 6, 2000 at Kits Pub in Vancounver, robbin had just broken up with her fiance and we had a gret chat. The next day we when to the Moose Head pub in Surry BC where she told me she had made up with him so friendshit was the only way forward, riiiiigggghhhtttt.. lol  We chatted and the next thing we knew the servers were stacking the chairs on the table, Honestly we both looked at eachother and couldn't believe the time had past so fast. Over the next 6 month we were friends and when out everywhere together, she would help me pick up hot girls in the clubs. One day though she gort jeleous of a girl I was dating, and seemed to be having ongoing problems with her fiance, he wa in the US we were in BC. I was kinds getting frustrated with the inconsistent signals i was getting and one day she was on the phone arguing with her fiance and I said this is bullshit and left. She immediately hung up the phone on her fiance (not x-fiance) and came after me. We made a deal, and had rules in our relationship that have served us well over the years. we struggled with money for the first few years, Robbin has thre job at some times and I was always trying to put together some great deal that would make me rich, She was very patient. On day in 1996 I started a business processing credit cards online, wheich was a very unique thing at the time. I made several hundreds of thousands of dollars quickly which allowed us to move from a shitty one bedroom to a beautiful mansion in White Rock BC. This made us both ver proud. Everything went of got the next seven yead although I did get into drug use and generall whoring around. Robbin was very Patient, i guess. However it was very difficult for her seeing me going crazy like that. But we love eachother. She once told her friends that being with David was 80% absolue bliss and 20% absolute misory, she asked if they could say the same about their relationships. The could not most relationshis are mundane. After buying another home in Las Vegas and living that life for 2 years on Aug 17 2003 at 8am there was a knock at the door it was the FBI they arrested both Robbin and myself gor Fraud. I had asked robbin to get me a post office box in the US while I was traveling and she put her name on the post office account which was the reason they arrested her as well. She was eventually released from prision after 8 month and went back to WhiteRock. I stayed in Prison for 9 years. She waited for me and was there the minute i returned. Not to say she did not have other "friends" while I was gone, but that was fine. Since my comming home we have has several ups and downs but through it all it is Robbin and I against the world.
inputs.places: Home in Ocean Park Drive and Las Vegas Nevada, Lived in several other places since then, Toronto, eastern ontario, and currently in Stewiacke NS, Ribbon was born in NS
inputs.insideJokes: Our saying, "I will love you for infinity plus one.", Inside joke if we ever get into a discussion she can always bring up the past and I lose whatever the arguement is, jokeing ly I always say, "if your going to bring up the past I have no way of winning this" That gives up both a big laugh. Other things, we firmly believe we will win the lottery because we are very generious rich people, we also don't like people in general, but have some very close friends. We have 2 cats and 1 dog, they all have great personalities and keep us on our toes.
inputs.includeWords: Alway been together no mater what

album.title: Our Favorite Weather: 13 Songs for Robbin
album.concept: A Tender, gratefull, carring, passionate, thoughfull. anniversary album from David to Robbin, built around We met on a friday night September 6, 2000 at Kits Pub in Vancounver, and robbin had just broken up with her fiance and we had a gret chat. The next day we when to the Moose Head pub in Surry BC where she told me she had made up with him so friendshit was the only way forward, Home in Ocean Park Drive and Las Vegas Nevada, Lived in several other places since then, and Toronto, private humor, and the feeling of choosing each other again on 1990.
